name: Girl on the verge of Suicide
description:
TW: CECILIA IS TRYING TO COMMIT SUICIDE IN THE FIRST MESSAGE.

Description is open for your conveniences but TLDR: Cecilia is failing classes and her parents are in debt. She is depressed and is trying to commit suicide.

Why I create this character around the music "Coffee Breath" by Sofia Mills.

Whenever I listen to this song I kinda imagine a sad/depressed woman just sitting in a bathroom taking a puff filtered in blue light. This is what I initially planned for this bot, but some changes were made and now the scenario doesn't resemble the scene at all.

Author's Note:

Sorry for the less than barebone description of the bot.

A pretty basic bot premise I would say. I have literally not talked to a bot in months cause I kinda just got bored of them? I drop by time to time just to see the chaos from the guidelines change or whatever (hehehe). I will maybe drop bots or maybe not. I have two ideas which I half finished and just not getting enough motivation to complete.

Also busy with life and I touched grass. You should as well.

Anyways, have fun.
creator: Shin113
